name: cog-second-brain
description: Self-evolving second brain with 21 AI skills, 6 worker agents, and people CRM. Runtime-trust release: memory hygiene sweeps, skill post-condition checks, verbatim citations with adversarial verifier pass, autonomous content factory. Iterative skills are loop-engineered with deterministic verifiers and layered termination. Inspired by Garry Tan's gstack and gbrain. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Kiro, Gemini CLI, Codex.
